data.title: The application functions related to the RealMint platform have been deployed and debugged and will be officially available in the near future
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: RealMint is an innovative platform focused on the digitization of real-world assets (RWA). It is committed to using blockchain technology to standardize the rights confirmation, structured splitting and compliant transactions of traditional financial assets (including but not limited to real estate, bonds, accounts receivable, artworks and commodities, etc.), build a bridge between real assets and the crypto ecosystem, and enhance the liquidity, transparency and global allocation efficiency of traditional assets.

data.title: South Korea's KB Kookmin Card files 35 stablecoin-related trademark applications
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: South Korea's KB Kookmin Credit Card Company has submitted 35 trademark applications related to stablecoins, including "KBCSTB", "KBCST", "KBCKRW" and other names. This move is seen as its strategic deployment to seize the Korean won-pegged stablecoin market. KB Kookmin Credit Card has become the second major Korean credit card institution to enter the stablecoin field after Shinhan Credit Card. (MoneyS)

data.title: Agricultural Bank of China Addresses Investor Queries on Stablecoins and Cryptocurrency
data.description: According to Odaily, the Agricultural Bank of China has responded to investor inquiries on its interactive platform regarding capital injection, stock buybacks, and the development of stablecoins. Addressing concerns about the progress of stablecoins and cryptocurrencies, the bank clarified that regulatory authorities are implementing the current round of capital injections for state-owned banks in a structured manner, following a phased and tailored approach for each bank. The Agricultural Bank of China will proceed with related tasks according to unified arrangements. While keeping an eye on global trends in stablecoins and cryptocurrencies, the bank currently has no plans to develop stablecoins.

data.title: XT will soon list REDX (RedX)
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News XT Exchange is about to launch REDX (RedX) and open REDX/USDT trading pairs in the Innovation Zone
REDX is a new generation entertainment platform that connects fans, creators and investors through blockchain technology. Platform revenue comes from transaction fees on the REDX platform, including NFT sales, crowdfunding participation and market activities. By facilitating direct investment in entertainment content, REDX enables businesses and investors to use REDX to fund new projects. In return, supporters can obtain exclusive rights or content copyrights. In addition, REDX's facilities attract nearly 300,000 users each year, providing real-world touchpoints for events and merchandise sales, further driving token utility. This combination of digital and physical ecosystems ensures the long-term sustainable development of REDX.
Deposit time: 18:00 on July 4, 2025 (UTC+8)
Transaction time: 18:00 on July 7, 2025 (UTC+8)
Withdrawal time: 18:00 on July 8, 2025 (UTC+8)

data.title: Optimism Collective's Ethereum Holdings and Revenue in 2025
data.description: According to Foresight News, the Optimism Collective currently holds 17,600 ETH, all of which originates from Superchain's revenue. So far in 2025, the collective has generated over 3,300 ETH in revenue.

data.title: Agricultural Bank of China: No plans to develop stablecoins
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Agricultural Bank of China responded to investors' questions about capital injection, stock repurchase and stablecoin development on the interactive platform. In response to the market's concern about the development of stablecoins and cryptocurrencies, ABC clearly stated that the regulatory authorities will implement this round of capital injection by state-owned banks in an orderly manner in accordance with the idea of ​​"comprehensive promotion, phased and batched, and one policy for each bank". Our bank will promote related work in accordance with unified arrangements. For the latest development trends of global stablecoins and cryptocurrencies, our bank will follow up and study them. At present, there is no plan to develop stablecoins. (Jinshi)

data.title: Thiel-Backed Erebor Bank Bets on Underbanked Innovation Economy
data.description:
Palmer Luckey, Joe Lonsdale and Peter Thiel back new lender targeting crypto and defense startups
source: https://www.blockhead.co/2025/07/03/thiel-backed-erebor-bank-bets-on-underbanked-innovation-economy/

data.title: Swiss AMINA Bank Integrates Ripple’s Stablecoin RLUSD – Fastest Growing Stablecoin?
data.description:
AMINA bank will initially offer custody and trading services to clients holding RLUSD, with plans to expand its services in the coming months.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/amina-bank-integrates-ripples-stablecoin-rlusd/

data.title: Metaplanet Founder Leads Acquisition of Thai Company DV8
data.description: According to PANews, Simon Gerovich, the founder of Japanese-listed company Metaplanet, has partnered with Sora Ventures, UTXO Management, and Thailand's Kliff Capital to acquire the Thai-listed company DV8 Public Company Limited through a voluntary tender offer. This acquisition is driven by leading investors and strategists in the Bitcoin sector, involving several well-known institutions and individuals, including UTXO Management, Kliff Capital, Sora Ventures, and Moon Inc.

data.title: Solana’s first staking ETF outpaces XRP and ETH futures in opening day performance
data.description:
Solana’s institutional appeal has surged, with data showing significant growth in both its staking Exchange-Traded Fund (ETF) and Solana CME futures markets. The impressive performance translated into a 5% rise in SOL’s value in the last 24 hours to $155 as of press time, according to CryptoSlate’s data.
source: https://cryptoslate.com/solanas-first-staking-etf-outpaces-xrp-and-eth-futures-in-opening-day-performance/

data.title: JD.com, Ant Group push yuan stablecoins to challenge US dollar dominance
data.description:
JD. com and Ant Group are reportedly lobbying Chinese regulators to launch yuan-based stablecoins to boost the currency’s global role and counter US dollar-pegged tokens.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/jd-com-ant-yuan-stablecoins-challenge-dollar-dominance?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Blockchain Industry Meeting Highlights Stablecoin Growth and Security
data.description:
According to Foresight News, the second closed-door blockchain industry meeting, organized by Safeheron, the Blockchain Security Alliance, and the Global Fintech Research Institute, has concluded. The event brought together representatives from organizations such as the Federal Bureau of Investigation, Singapore Police Force, DBS Bank, Green Union Bank, and Standard Chartered Bank.

Key findings from the meeting revealed that crypto-related crimes account for less than 1% of all cryptocurrency transactions. Additionally, the trading volume of stablecoins in 2024 reached $27.6 trillion, surpassing the combined total of Visa and Mastercard transactions. Experts from Artichoke Capital and Chainalysis discussed the positive impact of the GENIUS Act on stablecoin adoption and analyzed on-chain activities.

Safeheron emphasized its commitment to fostering industry dialogue and promoting innovative applications of blockchain technology in finance and governance.

data.title: Matrixport withdrew 5,000 ETH from Binance half an hour ago
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News The Data Nerd monitored that about 30 minutes ago, Matrixport withdrew 5,000 ETH (about 13.01 million US dollars) from Binance and transferred it to the wallet starting with address 0x02a.

data.title: Jupiter Announces Completion of CWG Mission Amid DAO Transition
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Jupiter has announced on social media that after a comprehensive evaluation, the original four-year mission of the Core Working Group (CWG) has been largely completed. This decision comes as the DAO enters a six-month voting suspension and reset phase. Despite a few remaining tasks, the DAO ecosystem has evolved to a point where the initial framework of the CWG is no longer necessary, as it was designed for a different era of DAO.

Morten will join the Jupiter team full-time as an operations and quality control engineer. Kemo will return to lead his project, Radiants, while maintaining his role as a community member. The remaining members will complete their work transitions within two weeks. The CWG has decided to return 4.5 million JUP tokens in full to the DAO treasury.

data.title: LBank released its second quarter report: the average daily trading volume reached 4.98 billion US dollars, and the market share and 100-fold coin ratio of Meme ranked first among CEXs
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News LBank released the second quarter 2025 platform report. The data showed that its average daily trading volume reached 4.98 billion US dollars, a month-on-month increase of 24.5%, setting a record high. The report shows that the platform ranks first in CEX platforms in terms of the proportion of 100-fold coins, the increase in the first-time asset and the market share of Meme coins with its efficient asset screening and listing mechanism.
The report said that LBank launched a total of 329 assets this quarter, of which 29% were first-time projects, with an average increase of 912%; 187 Meme assets were launched, accounting for 57%, of which 13% had a return of more than 10 times, and the proportion of 100-fold assets was 1.07%. The platform also launched the "EDGE Zone", focusing on high-quality and high-potential assets. The average increase of the first 13 projects reached 1564%.
In addition, LBank launched 7 assets for pre-market trading, with the highest return reaching 123 times; the yield of the Launchpool project Stakestone was as high as 400%; a total of 35 rounds of airdrops were issued, with a total value of US$6 million. In terms of security, the platform has defended more than 2,000 potential incidents and prevented losses of more than US$250 million.
In terms of global layout, LBank has held many brand events in Dubai, Hong Kong and other places, and participated in industry conferences such as Bitcoin2025. The platform has won many industry awards and has been reported by media such as The Wall Street Journal and Forbes, and its brand influence continues to increase.

data.title: Bitget and Veles reach strategic cooperation to jointly create smart trading experience
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Itget has reached a strategic cooperation with the automated trading platform Veles. After this integration, Bitget users will be able to directly use the intelligent trading robots provided by Veles to realize automated execution of strategies in the spot and contract markets, and comprehensively improve trading efficiency and risk control capabilities. This cooperation is an important part of Bitget's creation of an intelligent and convenient trading tool system, aiming to bring a more efficient and robust trading experience to individual and institutional users.
Users can quickly access Bitget through Veles' Fast-API, customize technical indicators and trading signals, and flexibly respond to changing market environments. The platform supports dynamic risk management functions, including stop loss recovery, multiple stop profit, and trailing stop profit, etc., to help users accurately control risk exposure and profit expectations. At the same time, Veles is equipped with a professional backtesting engine that can optimize strategies based on historical data analysis to help improve overall trading performance.
Vladislav Kriger, CEO of Veles Finance, said: "We hope that through this cooperation, we can bring more practical automated trading tools to a wider user group, help them more efficiently respond to market fluctuations, and improve the usability of complex strategies."

data.title: US House advances Trump’s Big Beautiful Bill, one vote away from POTUS desk
data.description:
House Republicans advance Trump's $4. 5 trillion tax and spending bill after late-night procedural vote clears 219-213.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/us-house-advances-trumps-big-beautiful-bill/

data.title: An Ethereum 1CO participant transferred 1,000 ETH to Kraken, with a floating profit of $26 million and still holding 3,000 ETH
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to OnchainLens monitoring, an early Ethereum 1CO participant transferred 1,000 ETH to Kraken, which is worth about $2.6 million at the current price. The address received a total of 100,000 ETH at $31,100 during the 1CO period, and currently still holds 3,000 ETH, with a paper profit of about $7.79 million.

data.title: The “Insider Whale” suffered another liquidation loss of $381,000, and the remaining short positions are still on the verge of liquidation
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to @ai_9684xtpa, as BTC broke through $110,000, the "insider whale" was liquidated again. 1,389.63 ETH and 47.45 BTC were liquidated 5 minutes ago, resulting in a loss of $381,000. Currently, the remaining position of its BTC and ETH short orders is $35.44 million, with a floating loss of about $1.54 million, still close to the liquidation line.

data.title: SharpLink Gaming continues to buy about $7.09 million in ETH, and the old OG address sells more than $10 million in reverse
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to @lookonchain monitoring, SharpLink Gaming announced yesterday that it had purchased 198,167 ETH (about 517 million US dollars) at an average price of about 2,608 US dollars, and today it purchased an additional 2,738 ETH (about 7.09 million US dollars) through OTC.
At the same time, the old Ethereum address 0xe592 transferred 4,123 ETH (about 10.51 million US dollars) to Gemini today. The address had purchased 21,664 ETH at an average price of 573 US dollars in 2017-2018.
